const calculateProfitLossPercentage=holding=>{const currentValue=holding.quantity*holding.assetId.currentPrice;const purchaseValue=holding.quantity*holding.purchasePrice;return(currentValue-purchaseValue)/purchaseValue*100;};// Format date
